events.text: Your car won't start on a rainy morning. The mechanic says the alternator needs replacing.

choices.label: Pay for the full repair
choices.resultText: The car runs smoothly again. Expensive but necessary.

choices.label: Patch it up cheaply
choices.resultText: It limps along for now. You worry about the next breakdown.

events.text: Heavy rains expose a leak in your roof. Water drips into the sitting room.

choices.label: Hire a proper roofer
choices.resultText: The roof is sealed. You sleep dry tonight.

choices.label: Place buckets and wait
choices.resultText: Mould starts forming. The problem grows worse.

events.text: A distant relative leaves you a modest inheritance. The lawyer calls with good news.

choices.label: Accept gratefully
choices.resultText: The funds clear. You whisper a prayer of thanks.

choices.label: Donate part to charity
choices.resultText: You kept some and gave back. It feels right.

events.text: You return from work to find your gate open and some belongings missing.

choices.label: Report to police
choices.resultText: Paperwork and patience. Little is recovered.

choices.label: Accept the loss and move on
choices.resultText: You replace what you can and double-check the locks.

events.text: A friend swears they have a hot tip on a local savings group — pay in easily with {moneyApp}. They want you in.

choices.label: Invest a solid amount
choices.resultText: The group paid out modestly. A pleasant surprise.

choices.label: Invest cautiously
choices.resultText: Small gain, small risk. Not bad.

choices.label: Decline politely
choices.resultText: You heard later it went sideways. Bullet dodged.

events.text: A family member calls asking to borrow money for school fees. They want it sent through {moneyApp} and sound desperate.

choices.label: Lend them generously
choices.resultText: They thank you profusely. Family comes first.

choices.label: Offer half the amount
choices.resultText: They accept, a little disappointed but grateful.

choices.label: Refuse — you need the money
choices.resultText: An awkward silence on the phone. They understand, maybe.

events.text: Your boda's chain snaps on a dusty road. A fundi nearby offers a quick fix.

choices.label: Pay for a full service
choices.resultText: The bike purrs again. Worth every shilling.

choices.label: Just fix the chain
choices.resultText: It works for now. Other parts look worn.

events.text: Your scooter's chain snaps on a quiet road. A mechanic nearby offers a quick fix.

choices.label: Pay for a full service
choices.resultText: The scooter purrs again. Worth every coin.

choices.label: Just fix the chain
choices.resultText: It works for now. Other parts look worn.
